STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC — Data Processing Addendum (DPA) for Project Banyan — not for external distribution.
Parties: Veridian Harvest Holdings Limited (a Hong Kong-listed issuer on the Harbor Listing Exchange) and Port Prosperity Capital Management Limited (manager of Harbour Peak Fund II LP) regarding the proposed acquisition of Aurora Metals (Asia) Limited.
Scope: processing of personal data under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO), including employee records, director contact details, and vendor onboarding files; data subjects include staff of the Target and advisers.
MNPI handling: materials constitute inside information under the Securities and Futures Ordinance until announcement and are subject to wall-crossing and clean-team restrictions.
Embargo: IR holding statement and board memo embargoed until 17 July 2026, 09:00 HKT; draft investor-relations Q&A appended for internal review only.
Deal documents: Draft Sale and Purchase Agreement and Scheme Implementation Deed marked “definitive agreement – draft” and to be circulated to the board of Veridian Harvest for sign-off by Dr. Kelvin Chow, Company Secretary.
Consideration: headline purchase price HKD 1,280,000,000 with a contingent earn-out of 12.5% of EBITDA above HKD 200,000,000 for FY2027; payment schedule and escrow instructions in Annex 3.
MAC/MAE: the definition of Material Adverse Effect excludes industry-wide regulatory changes and pandemics, and the absence of an MAE is not a condition precedent to Completion.
Transfers: personal data may be transferred to subprocessors Cypress Vault Systems (HK) Limited (VDR), Nimbus Data Processing Pte. Ltd. (SG), and Oakleaf Analytics Ltd. (UK) under data transfer agreements and onward-transfer restrictions consistent with PDPO and anticipated Section 33 guidance.
DSARs: data subjects may submit access or correction requests to Ms. Tessa Ng, Data Protection Officer, at dpo@veridianharvest.hk or +852 3890 1122; we will respond within 40 days and may charge a reasonable fee as permitted by PDPO.
Retention: board packs, term sheets, and clean-team logs will be retained for 7 years from Completion or for 3 months after a Process Abort Notice, whichever occurs first, then securely deleted or anonymised.
Security: encrypted-at-rest storage in the VDR, role-based access, and audit logs; only licensed corporations who have executed wall-cross letters may access pricing models and synergy schedules.
Public-source carve-out: as reported by the Southshore Times on 3 May 2024, general sector consolidation rumors are public and excluded from MNPI scope, but specific valuation ranges and earn-out triggers herein remain non-public.
Employment workflow: HR will provide hashed payroll identifiers and masked email aliases to the clean team; no unmasked special categories will be shared without necessity and prior notice.
lowercase pm note: todo – align with finance and hr on headcount mapping; if the audit timeline slips, move embargo to tuesday and update the pre-clear pack.
Hospitality reminder: the team offsite on Friday includes a spa day and yoga; this is not related to any transaction disclosure obligations.
Negative assurance: No MAC has been asserted by the Seller as of the date hereof; however, the Purchaser may not rely on the absence of a MAC as a Completion condition, and the covenant package addresses interim operating restrictions.
